title: Author maintainer-vendor-audit-schemas family for typed per-package substrate-relevance reports
description: Phase B supporting work for typelift-substrate-modernization. The per-package audit needs a typed shape; without it, audits become ad-hoc prose. Author `maintainer-vendor-audit-schemas` family at schema-universal under `private/universal/domain/system/schema-families/maintainer-vendor-audit-schemas/v0.1.0/`. Proposed Codable record `MaintainerVendorAuditModel`: { maintainerSlug, packageSlug, license, lastCommitDate, ideaSubstrateRelevant: enum (yes/no/marginal), implementationLoadBearing: enum (yes/AppleSubsumed/SubstrateAlreadyHas/SuperficiallySimilar), recommendedAction: enum (fork-modernize/adopt-pattern-fresh/archive-as-reference/skip), forkPriority: ordinal 1-5, forkDestination: optional path, auditorAgent: SlugRef, auditedAt: ISO-8601, rationale: prose, openQuestions: [string] }. Plus 4-5 ordinality tables for the enum fields. Plus tests at the substrate-DNA Tier 3 standard. Once landed, drives Phase B audit work (per-package audit beads can be marked as 'authoring MaintainerVendorAudit instance for X').
